positive: Minimalist vector illustration, perfect for T-shirt print. A stylized celestial body—a crescent moon and scattered glowing nebula dust—orbiting a simple, symmetrical mountain range. The style is flat, modern, and graphic, using thick, clean outlines (linework) and solid color blocks. Color palette limited to deep midnight blue, glowing ethereal cyan, soft lavender, and contrasting white for definition. Central composition, high contrast, clean silhouettes, suitable for direct-to-garment printing. Negative space is key.
